nameMeanings.name: Creye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alain, Camille, Fernand, Gaetan, Gilles, Gillis, Martial, Michel, Monique, Normand, Rosaire.
nickname for an overproud man, from Old French creste ‘crest (of a hill)’ (from Late Latin crista), used with reference to the comb of a rooster.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Simon Creye was born in 1215, in Corby, Lincolnshire, England. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes. He died in 1276, in St Paul's Cray, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Creye(은)는 1215년 영국 링코실르 코르비에서 태어났다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스트 폴'스 크라이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.
